text: Zoya, I'm the world's leading almost
therapist. I can solve whatever is your
problem. Tell me right now. Let's go.
>> I can't stop online shopping.
>> Why? What are you buying?
>> I just see ads everywhere and I want it.
I want to look different. I want to wear
what's cool. Every trend is changing
constantly.
>> So, you at least realize that this is a
problem, right? I suggest you buy things
online but different things like buy an
MCAT prep book, buy like a stethoscope,
you know, things that will inspire you
to do other things in your life.
>> The problem is that it's more fun to buy
clothes than it is to pay rent.
>> See, we found the roots of the problem.
You use the F word. The F word has never
taken anybody anywhere good.
>> Fun.
>> Fun. Anybody who bought a lab coat,
they're done after one lab coat. That's
not a way to live.
>> Which one of us is the one with the
problem here, sir?
>> Ma'am,
>> now we have to worry about your
pronouns.
